testCases.title: Verify that registration fails when username field is empty

steps.action: Navigate to registration page from url "https://opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com/web/index.php/auth/login"
Enter valid email "test@example.com", password "ValidPass@123", and confirm password "ValidPass@123"
steps.expected: Other required fields should be filled
Registration request should be submitted for validation

steps.action: Verify username required validation message is displayed
steps.expected: User should see error message for username field

steps.action: Verify user remains on registration page
